subject: docs: record forms app as 3rd tenant on shared utilities backend
body:
User confirmed the forms/form_submissions/profiles tables belong to a
separate forms app that also lives on this Supabase project, alongside
synctone and sancio. That means the UTIL_ env-var prefix isn't
misleading after all — it reflects that the project is a shared
"utilities" backend serving multiple apps.

Updated CLAUDE.md's shared-project note to call out all three tenants
and their table ownership, cleared the unresolved TODO, and rewrote the
SESSION_NOTES known-issue line to reflect the completed picture.

Tags: docs, shared-db
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: shared-db-hygiene
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01P5uv5tNGcoUDXWyzLbmArf
title: record forms app as 3rd tenant on shared utilities backend
